relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The life from the beginning was heard, seen, beheld, and touched.
Age-long life was manifested from the Father.
Witness becomes fellowship with the Father, the Son, and one another.
The writing seeks fullness of joy.
The Divine is light, with no darkness at all.
Claimed fellowship without light-walking is false.
Walking in light creates fellowship and cleansing.
Denying misalignment refuses the word within.

contemplative_note: 1 John 1 is embodied light: what is touched becomes witness, what is confessed becomes cleansed, and fellowship becomes walking in truth.
